summary: Iteration 7 - Verified certifi fix for MongoDB Atlas SSL. All 5 backend APIs pass. Frontend loads, login works, dashboard renders correctly with data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: certifi fix working: conditional tlsCAFile only for Atlas URLs. Local MongoDB works fine. All APIs: health, login (token key), vehicles, dashboard, finance/summary all passing.
rca_of_issue: MongoDB Atlas requires TLS with valid CA bundle. certifi provides the CA bundle. The fix conditionally applies tlsCAFile=certifi.where() only for Atlas (mongodb+srv or mongodb.net URLs), avoiding issues on local MongoDB.
